titleStmt.title: SII 38.481: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 481. (A.R. No. 481 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, Gaṇēśa shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravartti Rājarājadēva (III) Year: 29+1, Āvaṇi, 7 = 4th August 1246 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records the gift of 11(3/4) kāśu 3 mā kāśu by Piḷḷaiāṇḍāḷ, the wife of uḍaiyāṉ Tirukārōṇam-uḍaiyāṉ (a resident) of Perumaṅgalam. This amount was deposited in the temple treasury for burning of nine lamps from the interest accrued thereon. These lamps were to be burnt from the commencement of the service, tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi sandhi, till the early morning service next day. Provision of oil for the above lamps and rice for the food offerings to the god Tiruttuṟai-nāyanār was also to be met out from the same interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī�ja�jate
vaṟkuRead as śrīrājarājatevaṟkuyāṉṭuRead as māṇṭu 2 10kku EtirāmāṇṭuRead as etirāmāṇṭuĀvaṉiRead as āvaṇimātam Eḻān
tiyati nāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaināyaṉār tirumuṉpu tiru
ppaḷḷieḻucci tuṭaṅki ciṟukālaiccanti maṭaṅkumaḷavum
Ucciccantikku cantiviḷakkāka viṭṭa viḷakkil Eriyum
viḷakku Oṉpatukku tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkum tirumuṉ Oṭuk
ku Oṉṟukku Arici Irunāḻikku Upaiyamāka perumaṅkalamu
ṭaiyāṉ tirukāroṇamuṭaiyāṉ pāriyai piḷḷāṇṭāḷ
cipaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 10 1 mukkālna5 10 Ikkācil po
licai koṇṭu cantirātittavar Ippaṭi celuttakkaṭavatāṉamaikku
Digital edition of SII 38.481 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
